items.title: New (free) @sunsafterdark.bsky.social pod with @mikeascotto.bsky.social! We predicted what new contracts look like for Collin Gillespie, Jordan Goodwin, Mark Williams & Dillon Brooks, then I went through trade-up scenarios in the draft!

items.body_excerpt:
New (free) @sunsafterdark.bsky.social pod with @mikeascotto.bsky.social! We predicted what new contracts look like for Collin Gillespie, Jordan Goodwin, Mark Williams & Dillon Brooks, then I went through trade-up scenarios in the draft!
